start.filterFormula: OR(AND(ISNEW(), $Record.AbacusSupplier__c = TRUE), AND(PRIORVALUE($Record.AbacusSupplier__c) = FALSE, $Record.AbacusSupplier__c = TRUE), AND($Record.AbacusSupplier__c = TRUE, OR(ISCHANGED($Record.Name), ISCHANGED($Record.BillingCity__c), ISCHANGED($Record.BillingZip__c), ISCHANGED($Record.BillingStreetNr__c), ISCHANGED($Record.BillingPoBox__c), ISCHANGED($Record.BillingAddressLine2__c), ISCHANGED($Record.BillingAddressLine3__c), ISCHANGED($Record.BillingCountryISO__c), ISCHANGED($Record.AbacusAccountNr__c), ISCHANGED($Record.FirstName__c), ISCHANGED($Record.BillingState__c), ISCHANGED($Record.Website), ISCHANGED($Record.Email__c), ISCHANGED($Record.Phone), ISCHANGED($Record.Fax), ISCHANGED($Record.AccountLanguage__c), ISCHANGED($Record.CurrencyIsoCode))))
